name: gitlinediff
description: Diff single-line files (especially JSON) by pretty-printing both sides in memory before comparing.

gitlinediff.json.fileExtensions.markdownDescription: File extensions (without the leading dot) that are pretty-printed as standalone JSON.

gitlinediff.embeddedJson.enabled.description: Expand single-line JSON strings embedded inside other files (e.g. a YAML value like `attributeValue: '{...}'`).

gitlinediff.embeddedJson.fileExtensions.markdownDescription: File extensions (without the leading dot) scanned for embedded JSON string values.

gitlinediff.embeddedJson.autoDetect.markdownDescription: When no `keys`/`keyPattern` are configured, expand the value of any key whose string content parses as a JSON object or array.

gitlinediff.embeddedJson.keys.markdownDescription: Restrict embedded-JSON expansion to these exact key names. When non-empty, only these keys (and any matching `keyPattern`) are expanded.

gitlinediff.embeddedJson.keyPattern.markdownDescription: Optional regular expression matched against key names. A key is eligible if it matches this pattern (combined with `keys`).
